You are asked questions about a synthetic world. You are given NO background material — only the question itself. If you cannot know the answer, give your best guess in the required format anyway.
Answer format: for true/false questions reply with exactly one word, true or false. For list questions reply with a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Question: On day 360, across frames [actual], list every asset2 value X such that operates_in(sector=sector_13, asset=asset_09, asset2=?X) holds, labeling each value with the frame it holds in. Answer as (value, frame) pairs (possibly empty).
Structured form: {"at_day":360,"find_slot":"asset2","pattern":{"relation":"rel_b01_operates_in","args":{"asset":{"const":"asset_09"},"asset2":{"var":"X"},"sector":{"const":"sector_13"}}}}
